{
  "news": [
    {
      "title": "Ord.io与Zap关闭",
      "summary": "比特币Ordinals浏览器Ord.io宣布关闭，同时交易应用Zap也将停止服务。这可能导致Ordinals生态活动和交易量下降，对ORDI等资产构成利空。短期来看，市场情绪可能受影响，但影响范围有限。",
      "reason": "链上异动，作为Ordinals生态核心工具关闭，影响ORDI及铭文相关代币。",
      "category": "项目更新",
      "impact_coins": ["ORDI", "BTC"],
      "signal": "bearish",
      "impact_level": 2,
      "sources": [{"name": "The Block", "url": "https://www.theblock.co/post/400855/ord-io-shuts-down"}],
      "urgency": "immediate"
    },
    {
      "title": "加密公司停止购买比特币",
      "summary": "由法国NBA球星支持的加密公司宣布暂停比特币购买计划，未透露具体原因，市场猜测可能是资金紧张或监管担忧。这一消息可能削弱比特币买盘预期，对BTC构成短期情绪利空。",
      "reason": "机构动向，知名人士支持的加密公司停止买入，影响BTC市场信心。",
      "category": "市场结构",
      "impact_coins": ["BTC"],
      "signal": "bearish",
      "impact_level": 2,
      "sources": [{"name": "Bloomberg Crypto", "url": "https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitAFBVV95cUxQcWhBV3VFQnZSOFpGODRVSk1sT25HMW1LZFFlRHVjZ0xqX0NRTERDc1YxdWRhVGo0azI2eUMzRUN3Z0d3QkdmbkVfQktHZzFCQ01hdTMtZk40WXNTRDl2N3ZWQS1CeFBIeURzQ2hOeXVQS3hJVEFfZWtZa1V6QzhwMUF0cU1lbERHaHJSLWFBWVh3NnRJaW4tMTZ6UFhhWnlXeUN2WUE5b0Z0bVE4bElpbzF1bXA?oc=5"}],
      "urgency": "hours"
    },
    {
      "title": "a16z投资ARC项目",
      "summary": "知名风投a16z披露投资ARC，这是一家专注于零知识证明技术的项目。a16z的投资表明对ARC技术前景的看好，可能推动ARC代币价格上涨。作为基础设施类投资，对ZKP赛道也有提振。",
      "reason": "机构动向，顶级风投背书，利好ARC及ZKP板块。",
      "category": "项目更新",
      "impact_coins": ["ARC"],
      "signal": "bullish",
      "impact_level": 2,
      "sources": [{"name": "吴说区块链", "url": "https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMic0FVX3lxTE83RmdmNUtCdTdkSldKVGdNM1ZtVHpzc3FmY1lkcmhtMEtlMUdobnAwZFJFYks2MVRGVG5jWjRyR3laNVl5bnAta1BBV0k3Q21BVVhVZ2NONDBvSmFqZE4zWGF5TmxoTEZjRkhQUVREaGhSR1k?oc=5"}],
      "urgency": "hours"
    },
    {
      "title": "GIGA meme币单日涨66%",
      "summary": "新兴meme币GIGA在过去24小时暴涨66%，交易量激增。市场追捧meme币情绪再次升温，可能带动其他meme币如DOGE、SHIB等短暂上涨。但meme币风险极高，需警惕回调。",
      "reason": "市场情绪信号，meme币异动，反映资金追逐高风险资产。",
      "category": "市场情绪",
      "impact_coins": ["GIGA", "DOGE", "SHIB"],
      "signal": "neutral",
      "impact_level": 1,
      "sources": [{"name": "雪球加密", "url": "https://news.google.?oc=5"}],
      "urgency": "immediate"
    }
